INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('ClickHouse'), ('clickhouse'), ('CLICKHOUSE'), ('Cl1ckH0us3'), ('ClickHouse!'), ('nested query'), ('test ngramMinHash');
SELECT ngramMinHash(text) FROM (SELECT text FROM test_strings WHERE text LIKE 'Click%') AS subquery;
SELECT a.text, ngramMinHash(a.text, 4, 8) AS hashes FROM test_strings AS a JOIN test_strings AS b ON a.text != b.text WHERE a.text <> b.text;
SELECT ngramMinHash(text, 5, 10) FROM (SELECT text FROM test_strings) AS inner_query WHERE text IN ('ClickHouse', 'clickhouse');
CREATE TABLE temp_hashes (min_hash UInt64, max_hash UInt64);
INSERT INTO temp_hashes SELECT min(hash) AS min_hash, max(hash) AS max_hash FROM (SELECT ngramMinHash(text) FROM test_strings) GROUP BY text;
SELECT * FROM temp_hashes AS th WHERE th.min_hash > 0;
CREATE TABLE hashed_strings (original String, min_hash UInt64, max_hash UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY min_hash;
INSERT INTO hashed_strings SELECT text, min_hash, max_hash FROM (SELECT text, ngramMinHash(text) AS (min_hash, max_hash) FROM test_strings);
SELECT * FROM hashed_strings WHERE max_hash = (SELECT max(max_hash) FROM hashed_strings);
